TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 HONDA CR-V. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE AUTOMATIC BRAKE SYSTEM INDICATOR ILLUMINATED, BUT THERE WERE NO VEHICLES AHEAD. THE FAILURE ONLY OCCURRED WHILE DRIVING ON BACK ROADS AND SIDE STREETS. IN ADDITION, THE AUTO SAFETY FEATURE INDICATOR ILLUMINATED.

DRIVING MY 2017 CRV EX HOME FROM WORK. STOPPED AT RED LIGHT, FOOT ON BRAKE PEDAL.  WHEN THE TRAFFIC SIGNAL TURNED GREEN, I TOOK MY FOOT OFF THE BRAKE PEDAL, AND A MESSAGE CAME UP ON THE DASHBOARD SCREEN "BRAKE SYSTEM FAILURE".  THE ENGINE WAS STILL RUNNING.  I TURNED ONTO A SIDE

narrative.headline: What 2017 Honda Cr-V owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine-related complaints dominate owner reports for this model year, with gasoline fumes entering the cabin being the most commonly described symptom. Electrical system and fuel/propulsion issues are also widely reported, with some owners noting warning lights, abnormal noises, and wiring damage. A notable share of complaints also concern the forward collision avoidance system activating unexpectedly without an obstacle present.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report a strong smell of gasoline inside the cabin, most often noticed when the vehicle is idling or starting. · 2 fire · 8 crash · 5 injured

issues.sample: ENGINE LIGHT CAME ON AND MESSAGE SAID EMISSIONS SYSTEM PROBLEM AND THE HEADLIGHTS GOT HIGH AND THEN LOW AND THEN HIGH AND THEN LOW. I BROUGHT THE CAR TO A HONDA DEALERSHIP SAID THAT RODENTS CHEWED THE ENGINE MAIN WIRING HARNESS AND WOULD COST $1,000 TO REPLACE. IF THE WIRING HARN
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report warning lights illuminating for emissions system problems and erratic headlight behavior, with some attributing the cause to chewed wiring in the engine bay. · 6 crash · 7 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report abnormal noises associated with the fuel system that dealers have been unable to consistently replicate or diagnose. · 1 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 HONDA CR-V. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE AUTOMATIC BRAKE SYSTEM INDICATOR ILLUMINATED, BUT THERE WERE NO VEHICLES AHEAD. THE FAILURE ONLY OCCURRED WHILE DRIVING ON BACK ROADS AND SIDE STREETS. IN ADDITION, THE AUTO SAFETY FEATURE INDICATOR ILLUMINATED.
issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: Owners report the automatic brake system indicator activating and triggering braking events when no vehicle or obstacle is present ahead, particularly on back roads and side streets. · 6 crash · 8 injured
